#  What do the punch item color codes on a drawing mean? 
##  Answer 
Punch pins that have been added to a drawing in the Drawings tool are color-coded according to the status of the punch list item:
  * ![Icon Punch Item Initiated Work Required](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8ba0139963a55bb2e539f9ba06a9fbd8/fa27eaaeece82bfcd327d224e508a95f/icon-punch-item-initiated-work-required.png?fm=webp&h=22) A BLUE pin denotes _Initiated Work_ or _Required._
  * ![Icon Punch Item Ready For Review Close](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cf03b7e58497774aed3724f0b0e950f3/22d05c47f3ba873cfeeb56c8e5a0ce0e/icon-punch-item-ready-for-review-close.png?fm=webp&h=22) A YELLOW pin denotes _Ready for Review_ or _Ready to Close_.
  * ![Icon Punch Item Dispute Not Accepted](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d5f0a467235c4a1b63e2666781ee73ab/583a8364aa317e1e7bc66304644acf27/icon-punch-item-dispute-not-accepted.png?fm=webp&h=22) A RED pin denotes _In Dispute_ , _Work Not Accepted_ , or _Not Accepted_.
  * ![Icon Punch Item Draft Closed](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/58dc3f3f346df2ce3469e9d4d66cf85b/34353037263166de1db8fba388bc6306/icon-punch-item-draft-closed.png?fm=webp&h=22) A GRAY pin denotes _Draft_ or _Closed_.
